senses.gloss: to pierce with a lance to the bones, pierce through
to stick together, clump together, adhere, cohere
to arm oneself from head to foot
to build the houses in one row
verbal noun of شَكَّ (šakka, “to doubt”) (form I)
doubt, uncertainty, suspicion, scruple, scandal, hesitation
small tear (something torn), small rent, small split

examples.text: شك: هو التراب الهالك عند أهل العراق وهو سم الفار أيضاً، وعند أهل المغرب هو رهج الفار. وقال الرازي في خواصه: الشك شيء يؤتى به من بلاد خراسان من معادن الفضة وهو نوعان أبيض وأصفر إن جعل في عجين وطرح في بيت فأكل منه الفار مات ومات كل فارة تشم ريح ذلك الفار حتى يموت الكل أجمع وهو صحيح وقد وقفت عليه. الرازي في المنصوري: الزنجفر والشك يعرض من شربهما مثل ما يعرض من الزئبق المقتول إلا أن الشك أقوى جداً لأنه قاتل لا يتخلص منه وعلاجه مثل علاج من سقي الزئبق.

body.text: ; (S, O, Msb, K;) by which explanation is meant
vacillation in opinion between two things, whether they be equal
such that one of them outweighs
or, as the expositors explain its meaning in the Kur x. 94,
vacillation in opinion, between two inconsistent things, without making either of them to outweigh the other in the estimation of him who conceives the
hesitation, between two extremes that are equal
without the mind's inclining to either of them:
when one of them is made to outweigh, without the other's being rejected, it is
: (KT:) accord. to Er-Rághib, it is the
confusedness, of two inconsistent things, in the judgment of a man, and their being equal:

this is sometimes because of there being two indications, equal in his judgment, of the two inconsistent things; or of there being no indication thereof: and sometimes it relates to the question whether a thing be, or be not; and sometimes, to the question of what kind it is; and sometimes, to some of its qualities; and sometimes, to the accident that is the cause of its being: it is a species of
; but is more special than this; for
is sometimes the utter nonexistence of knowledge of the two inconsistent things; so that every
: (TA:) accord. to some, the primary meaning is
disturbance, of the heart and mind:
The day of which one doubts whether it be the last of one month or the first of the next month:
whether it be the last of Shaabán or the first of Ramadán;
and to fast on this day is forbidden.]       -A2-  Also
A small crack in a bone.
line of sewing, of a garment.
A coat of mail composed of narrow rings:
but he names no authority for this.]       -A3-  And [
